title: Get Lucky

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes large global streaming, durable playlist placement, and strong writer participation.

ownership.master_owner: Mix of label and artist-affiliated rights participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears strongly tied to creator-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No sale assumption baked into this song estimate
ownership.notes: Global hit songs can stay large at the gross level even when per-stream economics stay modest.

meaning_summary: This recording leans on atmosphere, texture, and replayable mood, which makes it durable in listener memory and long-tail streaming.
revenue_drivers: Playlist and mood-based streaming support repeat listening over long periods.
Steady niche demand and reissue interest can keep the track earning.
Licensing and soundtrack-style use can materially improve the long tail.
